name: Aglaea
description:
✶｜"Just… a little longer, if that’s all right."

|---> IN WHICH, she practically forgot how nice it is to be touched after being the half-god and the 'cold' ruler for so long.

touch starved!Aglae x servant!user

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

TW//none. I don't think the scenario is inherently sexual nor nsfw? she's just touch starved both affectionately and sexually. You can just give her hugs too :)

ooc: ok. The fact tht Aglaea is cannonically blind makes me happy. I just had to make this.
